remarks: Now offering 1 MONTH FREE with a one-year lease a significant savings opportunity on an already exceptional value. Experience elevated living in this brand-new, ultra-modern 2-bedroom, 2-bath residence, thoughtfully designed to offer a rare blend of style, comfort, and convenience. Excellent commuter location-just a seven-minute walk to the Metro-North train and a three-minute drive. This 1,195-square-foot home is architecturally and interior designed by the award-winning Granoff Architects, showcasing top-tier finishes and timeless design throughout. The apartment features 9-foot ceilings and oversized, light-filled windows, creating a bright and open atmosphere. The gourmet kitchen is appointed with quartz countertops, stainless steel BOSCH appliances, custom cabinetry, and premium fixtures. Wood-grain flooring flows throughout the home, complementing the luxurious bathrooms. Large walk-in closets, an in-unit washer and dryer, and a private deck provide everyday comfort and convenience. Residents enjoy access to a fitness center, tenant lounge, covered parking, and available storage units, further enhancing the lifestyle experience. Furry friends are welcome. This exceptional opportunity offers modern luxury, intelligent design, and long-term value-ideal for professionals seeking quality living without compromise.
